description_long: This is a rectangular, three-story apartment building with a flat, slightly gabled roof and a brick exterior. The facade features a regular arrangement of large rectangular windows, some with sliding glass doors leading to balconies on the shorter sides. The main entrance is centrally located on the longer side, marked by a double door and a large window above it. The building has multiple balconies with dark railings, providing outdoor space for several units. The windows are symmetrically distributed, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually. The overall design is functional and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality.
description: A three-story brick apartment building with large windows, balconies, and a central entrance, featuring a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with double doors, a large central window above, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows.
description_view_1: This side view highlights two stacked balconies and several windows, with the roof's gabled structure visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a long wall with regularly spaced windows and two balconies on the right side.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows three stacked balconies and a mostly windowless wall section.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a regular, mostly symmetrical grid pattern, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually across all sides of the building.
